named_docs.context: Document title - Bill to improve passenger experience during aviation checkpoint security screening

named_docs.name: Strategy to reduce patdowns
named_docs.context: the Administrator shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a strategy for the following five years to reduce the rate at which Administration personnel are required to conduct patdowns

named_docs.context: the Administrator shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a strategy for the following five years to reduce the need for passengers to divest items
